metadata.description: Auto-dev platform: structured workflows for dev agents, environment configuration, simulated user testing, requirements elicitation, and issue triage

plugins.name: zero-review
plugins.description: Auto-dev platform for agent-majority software teams. Five skills (auto-dev, autoenv, auto-req, auto-test, auto-triage), four roles (dev-agent, req-agent, user-agent, triage-agent), and cross-skill contracts. Humans supply requirements and intervene at key decision points; agents handle everything else.
